title: Build a REST API
description: Design, implement, and test a Node.js/Express REST API.

lessons.title: JSON Stringify
lessons.subtitle: Serializing data
lessons.starterCode:
const user = { id: 1, name: 'Grace' };
// TODO: log the JSON string of user
lessons.task: Print user serialized as JSON. Expected: {"id":1,"name":"Grace"}

lessons.title: JSON Parse
lessons.subtitle: Deserializing input
lessons.starterCode:
const raw = '{"id":2,"name":"Alan"}';
// TODO: parse raw and log only the name
lessons.task: Parse the JSON string and print just the name. Expected: Alan

lessons.title: Route Handler
lessons.subtitle: Pure-function request handling
lessons.task: Return 200 hello for GET /hello. Expected: 200 hello
lessons.hint: if (req.method === 'GET' && req.path === '/hello') return { status: 200, body: 'hello' }; return { status: 404, body: 'not found' };

lessons.title: Query Params
lessons.subtitle: Extracting ?key=value
lessons.task: Parse the query string into an object. Expected: 1,2
lessons.hint: Split on '&', then on '=' for each pair.

lessons.title: Status Codes
lessons.subtitle: Picking the right response
lessons.task: Return the right status code for each kind. Expected: 200,201,404,500
lessons.hint: Use a switch or an object map.

lessons.title: Validation
lessons.subtitle: Guarding input
lessons.task: First call prints {"ok":false,"error":"name required"}; second prints {"ok":true,"user":{"name":"Ada"}}.
lessons.hint: if (!body.name) return { ok: false, error: 'name required' };

lessons.title: Async Handler
lessons.subtitle: Awaiting data
lessons.task: Await getUser(42) and log the name. Expected: User42
